question: Find the details of the teachers who have taught the student with the earliest transcript issuance.
sql: SELECT Teachers.teacher_details FROM Teachers JOIN Classes ON Teachers.teacher_id = Classes.teacher_id WHERE Classes.student_id = (SELECT student_id FROM Transcripts ORDER BY date_of_transcript ASC LIMIT 1)

back_translation.intent: 获取最早的一份成绩单的教师详情

semantic.reason: 原始问题关注的是特定学生（student）的最早成绩单对应的教师，而SQL反向翻译描述中未明确指定学生关联条件，仅通过Transcripts表的日期排序和限制获取最早记录，可能遗漏了学生筛选逻辑。
